calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Feb-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Steven L. Simas, Esq., of Simas & Associates LTD, Tel. 805.547.9300, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.
Leslie E. Brast, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Tel. 415.703.5348, appearing for Respondent and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER KATHRYN NEWBURN'S Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate is Granted. Under the independent judgment standard, the weight of the evidence does not support either of the Nursing Board's findings of gross negligence. Order and Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Motion To Supplement The Administrative Record With The New Evidence Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 1094.5(E)In Support Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Feb-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Steven L. Simas, Esq., of Simas & Associates LTD, Tel. 805.547.9300, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.
Leslie E. Brast, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Tel. 415.703.5348, appearing for Respondent and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER KATHRYN NEWBURN'S Motion To Supplement The Administrative Record With The New Evidence Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 1094.5(E) In Support Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate is Denied. The new evidence is not the type of evidence properly admitted under Code of Civil Procedure 1094.5(e). Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
